title: Telegram bot init silently disabled on DNS hiccup at container start
resolution: cmd/core/wiring.go::startTelegramBotIfConfigured() now retries telegram.NewBot() 6× with exponential backoff (0,1,2,4,8,16s; ~30s total) and os.Exit(1) on retry exhaustion so Docker auto-restart can recover with fresh DNS resolver state. Shipped in commit 96acf294 (2026-06-09T05:53 UTC), CI green, deployed to <deploy-host> via ci-keyless promote (2026-06-09T15:33:39Z), bot live at 15:04:57Z.
affectedSurface: production telegram bot availability on <deploy-host> (and any other smackerel deployment with TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN configured)
deferredScopes: Chaos drill: force DNS failure at container start and verify the retry-then-exit path is exercised
relatedBugs: BUG-016-001 (weather tool timeout too tight) — shipped together in commit 96acf294
BUG-061-004 (provider_unavailable observability) — sibling theme: smackerel-core failures lacked operator-visible diagnostic detail
